Title: Verify dashboard loads with correct statistics cards when jobs exist
Preconditions: User is logged in as admin / at least 1 scheduled job exists
Steps: 1. Navigate to the Scheduled Jobs dashboard page. 2. Wait for the page to fully load. 3. Observe the stats cards section at the top.
Expected Result: Dashboard loads with three stats cards: Total Schedulers / Success Rate / Failure Logs. All values match backend data.

Title: Verify dashboard stats refresh accurately after a job run completes
Preconditions: User is on the dashboard / a job run is currently PROCESSING
Steps: 1. Note current stats values. 2. Wait for job run to complete. 3. Refresh dashboard. 4. Observe stats cards.
Expected Result: Stats update to reflect latest run. Success Rate recalculates. Failure Logs increments if run failed.

Title: Verify dashboard navigation to Create New Scheduler
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the dashboard page
Steps: 1. Navigate to Scheduled Jobs dashboard. 2. Locate Create New Scheduler button. 3. Click button.
Expected Result: User navigated to Create New Scheduler wizard Step 1. Form is empty.

Title: Verify dashboard returns error state when statistics API fails
Preconditions: User is logged in / backend stats endpoint returns 500
Steps: 1. Navigate to dashboard. 2. Wait for loading. 3. Observe stats cards.
Expected Result: Dashboard displays fallback state (-- or N/A) in stats cards. Page does not crash.

Title: Verify dashboard rejects access for unauthorized users
Preconditions: User logged in with non-admin role
Steps: 1. Navigate directly to Scheduled Jobs dashboard URL. 2. Observe response.
Expected Result: Access-denied message shown or user redirected. Dashboard data not rendered.

Title: Verify dashboard handles zero scheduled jobs correctly
Preconditions: User logged in as admin / no jobs exist
Steps: 1. Navigate to dashboard. 2. Observe stats cards. 3. Observe job list area.
Expected Result: Stats: Total=0 / Rate=0% or N/A / Failures=0. Empty state message shown. No division-by-zero.

Title: Verify dashboard handles extremely large statistics values
Preconditions: User logged in / system has 10000+ jobs
Steps: 1. Navigate to dashboard. 2. Observe stats cards.
Expected Result: Values render without overflow or layout breakage. Numbers formatted with separators.

Title: Verify dashboard handles Success Rate at 100% and 0% boundary
Test Data: Scenario A: all success / Scenario B: all failed
Preconditions: Two scenarios: all runs succeeded / all runs failed
Steps: 1. Set up all-success data. 2. Navigate and verify 100%. 3. Set up all-failed data. 4. Verify 0%.
Expected Result: Correct boundary percentages. No rounding errors or display artifacts.

Title: Verify job list displays all scheduled jobs with correct details
Test Data: At least 5 jobs with various statuses
Preconditions: User logged in / at least 5 jobs exist
Steps: 1. Navigate to dashboard. 2. Scroll job list. 3. Verify each card shows name / description / last run / status badge.
Expected Result: All jobs displayed as cards with name / description / last run / status badge / delete icon.

Title: Verify search bar filters jobs by name keyword
Test Data: Jobs: Morning AI Workflow / Data Cleanup / User Analytics
Preconditions: User on dashboard with multiple jobs
Steps: 1. Locate search bar. 2. Type Morning. 3. Observe results.
Expected Result: Only Morning AI Workflow shown. Other jobs hidden.

Title: Verify status filter dropdown filters by selected status
Test Data: Jobs with Running / Active / Failed statuses
Preconditions: User on dashboard with various status jobs
Steps: 1. Click status filter dropdown. 2. Select Running. 3. Observe job list.
Expected Result: Only Running jobs displayed. Dropdown shows Running.

Title: Verify sort by Last update orders jobs correctly
Steps: 1. Locate Last update sort option. 2. Verify default order. 3. Toggle direction.
Expected Result: Jobs ordered most recent first by default. Toggle reverses order.

Title: Verify search returns empty state when no jobs match
Steps: 1. Type zzz_nonexistent_job in search. 2. Observe job list.
Expected Result: Empty state message shown. No error. Clearing search restores list.

Title: Verify search handles script injection safely
Steps: 1. Type <script>alert(XSS)</script> in search. 2. Observe page.
Expected Result: Input treated as plain text. No script execution. UI not disrupted.

Title: Verify combined search and filter work together
Test Data: Morning AI Workflow (Running) / Email Campaign (Running) / Data Cleanup (Active)
Preconditions: User on dashboard with specific jobs
Steps: 1. Type Campaign in search. 2. Select Active filter. 3. Observe.
Expected Result: No results (Campaign is Running not Active). Changing to Running shows it.

Title: Verify search handles special characters correctly
Steps: 1. Type @#$%^&*() in search. 2. Observe. 3. Clear and type emoji. 4. Observe.
Expected Result: Both handled gracefully. No crashes. Empty state if no matches.

Title: Verify long job names without layout breakage
Steps: 1. Navigate to dashboard. 2. Locate long-named job. 3. Observe card layout.
Expected Result: Name truncated with ellipsis or wraps gracefully. No layout breakage.

Title: Verify creating new scheduler with all required fields succeeds
Test Data: Name: Test Morning Brief / Webhook: https://api.example.com/ai-webhook / API Key: test-key
Preconditions: User on Create New Scheduler wizard
Steps: 1. Enter Name. 2. Enter Description. 3. Select Repeat: Weekday. 4. Set Time: 08:00. 5. Click Next. 6. Select audience. 7. Enter Webhook URL. 8. Set Timeout. 9. Enter API Key. 10. Select Action: Morning Brief Widget. 11. Select Run Time. 12. Submit.
Expected Result: Scheduler created. Redirected to dashboard. New job in list with Active status.

Title: Verify wizard navigates between steps using Next and Cancel
Preconditions: User on Step 1 with required fields filled
Steps: 1. Fill Step 1 fields. 2. Click Next. 3. Verify Step 2 loads. 4. Navigate back. 5. Verify data retained. 6. Click Cancel.
Expected Result: Next advances to Step 2. Back preserves data. Cancel exits without creating job.

Title: Verify Schedule Time picker accepts valid times
Steps: 1. Click Schedule Time. 2. Select 14:30. 3. Verify. 4. Change to 00:00. 5. Verify.
Expected Result: Both times accepted and displayed in HH:MM format.

Title: Verify wizard rejects when required Name is empty
Steps: 1. Leave Name empty. 2. Fill other fields. 3. Click Next.
Expected Result: Form does not advance. Inline validation error on Name field.

Title: Verify wizard rejects invalid webhook URL format
Preconditions: User on AI Agentic Process section
Steps: 1. Enter invalid URL. 2. Fill other fields. 3. Attempt submit.
Expected Result: Validation error on URL field. Form does not submit.

Title: Verify wizard rejects when API Key is empty
Preconditions: User on AI Agentic Process section
Steps: 1. Enter valid Webhook URL. 2. Leave API Key empty. 3. Attempt submit.
Expected Result: Validation error on API Key field. Form does not submit.

Title: Verify wizard handles Timeout at maximum (1 hour)
Preconditions: User on AI Agentic Process section
Expected Result: 01:00:00 accepted. Values exceeding 1 hour rejected or capped.

Title: Verify wizard handles Name at max character length
Steps: 1. Enter 255-char name. 2. Complete wizard. 3. Try 256-char name.
Expected Result: 255 chars accepted. 256+ chars truncated or validation error.

Title: Verify wizard handles Set time with past time
Steps: 1. Select Morning Brief Widget. 2. Select Set time. 3. Set time to 2 hours ago. 4. Submit.
Expected Result: System rejects past time or schedules next occurrence. Clear indication.

Title: Verify save rejects when required field cleared

Section: Scheduled Jobs > Edit Scheduler > Job Configuration
Title: Verify editing deleted job shows error

Title: Verify no-change save does not create false update

Steps: 1. User A changes time and saves. 2. User B changes description and saves.

Title: Verify selecting all 500+ users

Preconditions: User A exists individually and in a group

Expected Result: System deduplicates. User A receives delivery once. Count reflects unique users.

Title: Verify export downloads history log data

Title: Verify stats recalculate after retry success

Expected Result: Success Rate increases / Failed Rate decreases. Mathematically consistent.

Title: Verify job creation succeeds with all required fields

Steps: 1. POST /api/v1/scheduled-jobs with required fields. 2. Inspect response.
Expected Result: 201 with job object / generated id / status ACTIVE.

Title: Verify job creation with all required and optional fields
Test Data: Required + description / timezone / timeout / audience_user_ids / audience_group_ids
Steps: 1. POST /api/v1/scheduled-jobs with all fields. 2. Inspect response.
Expected Result: 201 with all optional fields stored correctly.

Title: Verify job list returns paginated results
Steps: 1. GET /api/v1/scheduled-jobs?page=1&limit=10. 2. GET page=2.
Expected Result: First: 10 jobs with pagination metadata. Second: remaining jobs.

Title: Verify get job detail succeeds with valid ID
Steps: 1. GET /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/:id. 2. Inspect body.
Expected Result: 200 with full job object including audience / cron / webhook / action.

Title: Verify job update succeeds with partial fields
Steps: 1. PUT /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/:id. 2. GET to confirm.
Expected Result: 200. Only description changed / other fields unchanged.

Title: Verify job deletion returns 204
Steps: 1. DELETE /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/:id. 2. GET same ID.
Expected Result: 204 on delete. 404 on subsequent GET.

Title: Verify creation returns 400 when required field missing
Steps: 1. POST without name. 2. Inspect response.
Expected Result: 400 with validation error: name required.

Title: Verify creation returns 422 for invalid cron
Steps: 1. POST with invalid cron. 2. Inspect response.
Expected Result: 422 with invalid cron expression error.

Title: Verify update returns 409 when PROCESSING
Steps: 1. PUT /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/:id.
Expected Result: 409: cannot update while PROCESSING.

Title: Verify deletion returns 409 when PROCESSING
Steps: 1. DELETE /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/:id.
Expected Result: 409: cannot delete while PROCESSING.

Title: Verify get detail returns 404 for non-existent ID
Steps: 1. GET /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/non-existent-uuid.
Expected Result: 404: job not found.

Title: Verify list filters by status and search with pagination
Steps: 1. GET with status + search + pagination params. 2. Inspect schema.
Expected Result: 200 with only ACTIVE jobs matching Morning. Pagination metadata included.

Title: Verify creation handles max length name
Steps: 1. POST with 255-char name. 2. POST with 256-char name.
Expected Result: 255 → 201. 256 → 400 validation error.

Title: Verify list handles zero results
Steps: 1. GET with non-matching search.
Expected Result: 200 with empty array / total: 0.

Title: Verify list handles page beyond total pages
Steps: 1. GET with page=999.
Expected Result: 200 with empty array / correct metadata.

Title: Verify manual trigger succeeds and creates job run
Preconditions: Admin authenticated / ACTIVE job with audience
Steps: 1. POST /api/v1/scheduled-jobs/:id/trigger. 2. Inspect response. 3. GET runs.
Expected Result: 202. New run record: PENDING → PROCESSING.

Title: Verify cron fires at configured schedule
Steps: 1. Create job. 2. Wait for next minute. 3. Query runs.
Expected Result: New run automatically created at scheduled time.

Title: Verify audience resolution deduplicates overlapping groups
Steps: 1. Trigger job. 2. Inspect run total_users.
Expected Result: u1 appears once. total_users = unique count.

Title: Verify timezone applied correctly to cron
Steps: 1. Create job. 2. Inspect next run time.
Expected Result: Scheduled at 08:00 ICT not UTC.

Title: Verify manual trigger returns 404 for non-existent job
Steps: 1. POST /trigger for non-existent ID.
Expected Result: 404: job not found.

Title: Verify trigger fails when job has no audience
Steps: 1. POST /trigger.
Expected Result: 400: no audience to process / or run with total_users: 0.

Title: Verify trigger handles 10000+ users
Steps: 1. Trigger. 2. Monitor progress.
Expected Result: Run created with correct total. Batch processing succeeds.

Title: Verify concurrent manual triggers handled
Steps: 1. Send 2 simultaneous trigger requests. 2. Query runs.
Expected Result: Either both create runs or second returns 409. No corruption.

Title: Verify webhook sends correct payload to AI service
Steps: 1. Trigger with 3 users. 2. Inspect mock request.
Expected Result: POST with { job_id / run_id / audiences: [{user_id / display_name / email}] / metadata }.

Title: Verify webhook has correct auth headers
Steps: 1. Trigger. 2. Inspect headers.
Expected Result: X-API-Key matches config. X-Signature is valid HMAC-SHA256.

Title: Verify callback processes and updates per-user status
Test Data: Callback: { job_id / run_id / user_id: u1 / status: success / result_payload }
Steps: 1. POST /callback with valid data + X-Signature. 2. Inspect status.
Expected Result: 200. User u1 → SUCCESS.

Title: Verify batch throttling at 10 per batch
Preconditions: Job with 25 users / mock with timestamps
Steps: 1. Trigger. 2. Inspect request logs.
Expected Result: 3 batches: 10 / 10 / 5 with delays between.

Title: Verify webhook timeout respected
Steps: 1. Trigger. 2. Wait. 3. Inspect run.
Expected Result: After 5s: timeout. Run → FAILED/CUTOFF.

Title: Verify callback rejects invalid HMAC signature
Steps: 1. POST /callback with wrong signature.
Expected Result: 401. Callback rejected. Status unchanged.

Title: Verify callback returns 404 for non-existent run
Steps: 1. POST /callback with fake run_id.
Expected Result: 404: run not found.

Title: Verify timeout at max boundary (3600s)
Steps: 1. Create with 3600. 2. Create with 3601.

Title: Verify duplicate callback handled idempotently
Steps: 1. Send callback for u1 again.
Expected Result: 200 no change or 409. No duplicate widgets.

Title: Verify empty result_payload handled
Steps: 1. POST /callback with null payload.
Expected Result: 400 or processes with empty content.

Title: Verify scheduled delivery mode delivers at specified time

Title: Verify delivery handles deactivated user gracefully

Title: Verify PENDING → PROCESSING → COMPLETED when all succeed

Expected Result: COMPLETED. total: 3 / success: 3 / failed: 0 / cutoff: 0.

Title: Verify run history returns paginated results
Steps: 1. GET /runs?page=1&limit=10.
Expected Result: 200 with 10 runs / pagination / most recent first.

Title: Verify retry of failed deliveries succeeds

Title: Verify late callback after CUTOFF handled

Expected Result: Computed HMAC matches X-Signature.

Title: Verify callback validates HMAC signature
Steps: 1. Compute correct HMAC. 2. POST /callback with correct signature.
Expected Result: 200: accepted.

Steps: 1. POST /scheduled-jobs with non-admin JWT.

Expected Result: Brief accurately reflects real data. No fabricated content.

Expected Result: Valid JSON. Schema intact. All characters preserved.

Title: [M3] Verify widget JSON intact with minimal content

Expected Result: P95 within SLA. No unexpected timeouts. Accurate status.

Title: [M4] Verify throughput with max batch concurrency

Expected Result: All complete. Throttling respected. Error rate < 1%.

Expected Result: Run FAILED. All per-user FAILED. No widget. Friendly error. System stable.

Title: [M5] Verify degradation when AI returns 500
Steps: 1. Trigger. 2. Inspect run. 3. Check home pages.
Expected Result: Run FAILED. No malformed widgets. Error logged. Recovery works.

Preconditions: AI responds for first batch only
Steps: 1. Trigger. 2. First batch succeeds. 3. Rest timeout. 4. Inspect.
Expected Result: CUTOFF. success: 10 / cutoff: 20. Widgets for 10 only.

Title: Verify back arrow returns to job list

Expected Result: Returned to dashboard/job list. No unsaved warning if unmodified.

Title: Verify one-time job (Does not repeat) executes once
Steps: 1. Select Repeat: Does not repeat. 2. Set time. 3. Complete wizard. 4. Wait for execution. 5. Check status.
Expected Result: Executes once. Status → Completed/Inactive. Does not re-run.

Section: Scheduled Jobs > Edit Scheduler > History Logs
Title: Verify History Logs search filters by keyword
Steps: 1. Locate search bar. 2. Type keyword. 3. Observe filtered results.
Expected Result: Results filtered. Only matching runs shown. Clear restores list.

Section: Scheduled Jobs > Edit Scheduler > History Logs
Title: Verify Select All + bulk retry re-processes all failures
Preconditions: Failure Logs with multiple failed users
Steps: 1. Click Select all. 2. Click bulk Retry. 3. Observe dialog. 4. Confirm.
Expected Result: All selected. Confirmation shown. All re-processed on confirm.
